Auth flow

How a request gets from the CLI to the daemon without leaking the bearer token to other processes.

crate CLI
→
reads ~/.config/crate/
config.yaml (0600)
→
Authorization: Bearer ...
→
crated

Why a token at all when it's localhost?

So that moving to a remote host later (Pi agent, tailnet exposure) is a config change, not a code change. Cheap now, no migration later.
